TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr_hunting_taboos_Angai

S.FORM: makasin ia eh iku masin ia te ku poisua aracakan.
S.TRANSL: 現在呢，我現在要說關於狩獵的事。
Now, I am going to talk about hunting.

S.FORM: miana mamarurang nuu aracakan ia uaca muaca pa m uh mocan musa rʉmʉra aririan sua uh sisin.
S.TRANSL: 過去年長者若要狩獵，會先趕去叢林，側聽畫眉鳥的聲音。
In the past, if the elders go hunting, they would rush to the forest first, and eavesdrop on the sound made by the Melodious Laughingthrush.

S.FORM: uh taniara s nuu karanana taniara muaca nuu mamanʉng in ia mo muaca cu.
S.TRANSL: 如果不同的日子去，如果聲音好的話，就去了。
If they go on a different day, and if the sound is good, they would then proceed to hunt.

S.FORM: mokusa sia tu tu'una in eh uh tia tu'una in aracakan tia tu'una in katataruan.
S.TRANSL: 要到它狩獵的地方，在它的位置製作工寮。
(The hunter) will go to its place where he hunts to build a shed.

S.FORM: nuu mosa ci nia mosa cu nia katataruan uN kamanʉng sua tia sirupain rʉmʉnge tarʉ tarʉ ringee.
S.TRANSL: 去那裏建造獵寮，製作要使用的陷阱。
(The hunter) would go there to build a shed, and make cushion traps that are going to be used.

S.FORM: masin masi ci ia nuu n nura ia muaca cu rumingee.
S.TRANSL: 明天的時候，就走去放陷阱。
On the next day, (they) would then go and set up traps.

S.FORM: rumingee en nuu mocacan rumingee cʉmʉ'ʉra sua ramang marʉkurakurapʉ.
S.TRANSL: 如果去放陷阱，就會觀察野獸所留下的足跡。
If they go to set up a trap, they would observe tracks left by animals.

S.FORM: nuu cʉmʉre en sua ramang vavuru ia kamanʉng kee m sua ringee vavuru.
S.TRANSL: 若看到山豬的足跡，就製作山豬的陷阱。
If (the hunter) sees tracks left by boars, he/she would make a boar trap.

S.FORM: cʉmʉre en nen ramang to'orung ia humar kamanʉng kee ringee to'orung.
S.TRANSL: 若看到山羌的足跡，就製作山羌的陷阱。
If (the hunter) sees tracks left by the barking deer, he/she would make a barking deer trap.

S.FORM: uh masua cu nuu nimuringee ci ia muaca cu mosa te ta tʉtʉnʉvu taru'an ni.
S.TRANSL: 如果那樣做好了，已經放好陷阱了，就趕去他們的獵寮。
If things have been done like that, and they have set up the traps, they would then rush to go to their hunting sheds.

S.FORM: eh nukai motaru'an nia ia muaca mu mutanasʉ mutanasʉ.
S.TRANSL: 如果不在獵寮過夜，就回家。
If they are not staying overnight in the sheds, they would go back to their houses.

S.FORM: nuu kat mutan usʉpatʉ taniara hara sa urima taniara ia musa ci nia musa ci nia sʉmʉrʉcʉ sʉmʉrʉcʉ a sua uh ringee.
S.TRANSL: 四天或五天的時候，就去了那裏，探查陷阱。
When four or five days have passed, (the hunter) would go there and check the traps.

S.FORM: nuu mamanʉng in ʉcʉp in ia una h hu poringee vavuru.
S.TRANSL: 如果夢很好的話，就有陷阱中到山豬。
If (he/she) dreamed of something good, there will be traps successfully catching some boars.

S.FORM: vavuru kara ha to to'orung.
S.TRANSL: 是山豬呢，還是山羌？
Is it boars that are caught, or is it barking deers?

S.FORM: ah miana nuu masu in ia macancangarU kia.
S.TRANSL: 以前，如果那樣的話，我就很高興。
In the past, if something like that happens, I would be very pleased.

S.FORM: pu'i pu'i tanaha nuu nipuringee kia marʉkurakurapʉ.
S.TRANSL: 如果陷阱有中野獸，我就回家。
I would go home if I caught some beasts with the traps.

S.FORM: muse ci tanasa ia macangcangarʉ sua uh ta kat tanam nannakʉ tanasa sii m nipuringee kia marʉkurakurapʉ.
S.TRANSL: 回到家了，家裡的女人們就很高興，因為我有中到野獸。
After (my) coming home, the women in the house would be happy, because I had caught some beasts with the traps.

S.FORM: nuu masu in ia 'una cau iovutu tana uh rovʉvʉ ru uh tia cuma cʉmʉra masu in ia te ci kia mosa nia putu putukava ha nipuringara vavuru kara ha to'orung.
S.TRANSL: 如果那樣的話，我就要把中到的野獸剝皮，看是山豬呢，還是山羌。
If something like that happens, I will skin what I have caught with the traps, depending on whether it is a boar or a barking deer.

S.FORM: masua cu mun na nia iovutu cau matacuvucuvung cʉmʉ'ʉra sua nipuringara.
S.TRANSL: 那樣了之後，就有人來，聚集在一起看中到的獵物。
After that, there will be people coming over, gathering to see what has been caught by the traps.

S.FORM: putukava putukava ci kia ka'ara'aram po'ocipi sua uh 'aram sovungun sovungun cau niivatu.
S.TRANSL: 我將野獸剝皮，做成肉塊，煮肉，分給來的人。
I would skin the beast, cut it into meat chunks, cook them, and hand it out to the people who came.

S.FORM: uh makasua ci ia uh macangcangarʉ sua cau niivatu rovʉvʉ.
S.TRANSL: 那樣的話，來坐坐的人都很高興。
If something like that happens, the people who came to visit would be very pleased.
